outputs.headline: NG Basis -$0.22; Signals Mixed
outputs.narrative: EIA physical as-of May 18 is $0.22 below NGN26's $3.285 settle. COT remains bearish but positioning is improving, while narrative is mildly bullish. Negative basis and cross-signal divergence limit conviction.
outputs.data_quality_note: EIA physical uses latest available 2026-05-18 data; COT uses 2026-05-19 weekly report. Basis is as-of, not exact same-day.

outputs.headline: Corn As-Of Basis -$0.03; COT Easing
outputs.narrative: Corn proxy physical as-of May 22 is $0.03 below ZCN26's $4.5575/bu settle. COT remains bullish but elevated and easing. Narrative is near-neutral to slightly bullish. Near-flat basis and mixed signals limit conviction.
outputs.data_quality_note: Physical price is a corn proxy, not strict Decatur or Gulf cash basis. COT uses 2026-05-19 weekly report. Basis is as-of, not exact same-day.

outputs.headline: Soy Proxy Basis +$35.23; Mixed
outputs.narrative: Soybean meal physical as-of May 18 is $35.23 above ZSN26 converted to about $398.17/short ton. COT remains bullish but elevated and easing, while narrative is mildly bullish. Proxy mismatch limits conviction.
outputs.data_quality_note: Physical leg is soybean meal, not raw soybeans; futures are unit-converted to USD/short ton. This is related proxy basis, not strict soybean cash basis.
